scene.message: Mark: That's not true!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Spoiled brat...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Maki...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Maki...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Sonomura...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: You think so too,{nl} don't you, {ctl07:1}?!{waitkey}{ret}
You think I'm the worst{nl} kind of girl, right?!{ctl0e:19}{ret}
Maki: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Hmph...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Welcome back,{nl} Maki!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Yay!{nl} Welcome back, Maki!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Welcome back,{nl} Sonomura!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Everyone...{wait_fr:88}{nl} I'm back!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Sniffle...{nl} Even I'm tearing up...{waitkey}{ret}
